relations.note: Skip procedure preserves the core layout/color styling defined in the base layout rule.
Signature radius is always applied to the CTA button in the layout, persisting even when background is skipped.
Locks the specific background asset used by the layout and defines skip conditions.

quotes: Always set a solid `background-color` of Sunshine `#faa31b` as fallback
**Headline** → Brand Blue `#00529b`, centered, sitting in the **top third**, Nunito Sans weight 800, ~28px, one line.
Fill Deep Blue `#003D74`, white label (Nunito Sans 800, 18px), with a Gold `#FFC20E` arrow `›` (24px) after two non-breaking spaces. Size 248 × 64px.
A full-width banner where a **headline** and a **single button** are overlaid on the branded orange/yellow gradient image, both horizontally centered and stacked.

the gradient PNG, applied as the section background, sized `cover`, `no-repeat`, centered, spanning the full content width (600px). Always set a solid `background-color` of Sunshine `#faa31b` as fallback
**Headline** → Brand Blue `#00529b`, centered, sitting in the **top third**, Nunito Sans weight 800, ~28px, one line.
**Button** → centered, in the **lower-middle** below the headline. Fill Deep Blue `#003D74`, white label (Nunito Sans 800, 18px), with a Gold `#FFC20E` arrow `›` (24px)

rules.intent: Preserve the locked composition and color treatment of the branded gradient CTA banner.
rules.rule_text: The Gradient Callout CTA is a full-width banner with a headline and a single button, both horizontally centered and stacked over the branded orange/yellow gradient image. The gradient PNG is the section background, sized cover, no-repeat, centered, spanning full content width (600px); a solid Sunshine (#faa31b) background-color is always set as fallback since clients like Outlook drop background images. Section padding is 48px 25px 56px 25px. The headline is Brand Blue (#00529b), centered in the top third, Nunito Sans weight 800 (ExtraBold), ~28px, one line, with headline padding 0 0 32px 0. The button is centered in the lower-middle below the headline: fill Deep Blue (#003D74), white label (Nunito Sans 800, 18px), with a Gold (#FFC20E) arrow '›' (24px) after two non-breaking spaces; button size 248 × 64px.
rules.snippets:
<mj-section
    background-url="https://solstice-public-forever.s3.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/design_library/12912e15-c371-4bf0-a5b9-08a7f8c57d20/7772aba5-1ff5-4985-80bf-c15b782111a4/Gradient_callout.png"
    background-size="cover"
    background-repeat="no-repeat"
    background-position="center center"
    background-color="#faa31b"
    padding="48px 25px 56px 25px">

quotes: do not re-host or recolor. The background may be skipped **only in very, very rare cases** (plain-text/AMP fallback, a client that strips all images, a hard size budget). When skipped, the section still renders on a solid Sunshine `#faa31b` fill and every other rule stays identical.

rules.intent: Prevent re-hosting/recoloring of the approved gradient asset and preserve fallback behavior.
rules.rule_text: The gradient callout background asset is the specific Gradient_callout.png hosted at the Solstice design_library URL — do not re-host or recolor it. The background image may be skipped only in very, very rare cases (plain-text/AMP fallback, a client that strips all images, a hard size budget); when skipped, the section still renders on a solid Sunshine (#faa31b) fill and every other rule stays identical.

quotes: `border-radius: 49.52px 1.76px 40px 1.76px;` — this four-value asymmetric radius is the signature shape

**Button radius (mandatory, never change):** `border-radius: 49.52px 1.76px 40px 1.76px;` — this four-value asymmetric radius is the signature shape and is **always required on every instance**, even when the background is skipped.
Never simplify it to a single value, swap the corners, or round the decimals.

rules.intent: Protect the signature asymmetric CTA button shape as an unbreakable brand mark.
rules.rule_text: The button radius is the signature four-value asymmetric shape border-radius: 49.52px 1.76px 40px 1.76px (radius.cta.signature_asymmetric) and is mandatory and never changed — always required on every instance, even when the background is skipped. Never simplify it to a single value, swap the corners, or round the decimals.

quotes: If the background must be skipped, remove only `background-url`, `background-size`, `background-repeat`, and `background-position` — keep `background-color="#faa31b"` and the headline color, button color, and button radius exactly as above.

rules.intent: Ensure image-skip fallbacks preserve the fallback fill and all core styling.
rules.rule_text: If the background must be skipped, remove only background-url, background-size, background-repeat, and background-position — keep background-color="#faa31b" (Sunshine) and the headline color, button color, and button radius exactly as specified.
